ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Common name of the plant */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant type (e.g., Spathiphyllum, Philodendron) */,
  "variegated" INTEGER /* Whether the plant is variegated */,
  "water_demand" INTEGER /* Water demand of the plant (1-5) */,
  "sunlight_demand" INTEGER /* Sunlight demand of the plant (1-5) */,
  "rareness" INTEGER /* Rarity of the plant (1-5) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the plant image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plant */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Growth rate of the plant (e.g., slow, medium, fast) */,
  "mature_size" TEXT /* Mature size of the plant (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range for the plant (e.g., 60-80°F) */,
  "toxicity" INTEGER /* Whether the plant is toxic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES plant_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant type (e.g., Spathiphyllum, Philodendron) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plant type */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the plant type */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the plant type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_care" (
  "care_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each care instruction */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant the care instruction belongs to */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the plant */,
  "watering_frequency" TEXT /* Watering frequency for the plant (e.g., weekly, biweekly) */,
  "fertilization_frequency" TEXT /* Fertilization frequency for the plant (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "pruning_frequency" TEXT /* Pruning frequency for the plant (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("care_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_care_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., plant, flower, leaf) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_images_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer, staff) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant in the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the plant in the item */,
  "item_cost" REAL /* Cost of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the plant in stock */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date the plant was last restocked */,
  "restock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the plant to restock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_reviews_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant being asked about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who asked the question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer */,
  "question_date" TEXT /* Date the question was asked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_questions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_questions_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user account associated with the staff member */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the staff member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the staff member */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "support_text" TEXT /* Text of the support request */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "support_date" TEXT /* Date the support request was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_support_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant the video belongs to */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of the video (e.g., care instructions, planting guide) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_videos_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_blogs" (
  "blog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blog post */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant the blog post belongs to */,
  "blog_text" TEXT /* Text of the blog post */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the blog post was published */,
  "blog_title" TEXT /* Title of the blog post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_blogs_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant the news article belongs to */,
  "news_text" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_news_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)
